title: Head of Story and Script Development (Chinese Language Content)
description:
Company Overview

mm2 Entertainment is Singapore’s leading media entertainment and content company with regional offices in Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Beijing and the United States. mm2 Entertainment produces content for a multitude of platforms: movies, TV and web series, commercial short films and formats; and provides services that cover the entire film-making process, including securing financing, production and distribution, as well as securing advertising and sponsorship.

Job Summary

The Head of Story and Script Development will lead the creative teams driving the Chinese-language content slate, developing compelling scripts across diverse genres and formats. This role shapes a dynamic development pipeline that connects with local and regional audiences to deliver both commercial success and critical acclaim.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain a robust, multi-format content pipeline aligned with company objectives and market opportunities.
  • Conceive, write, and polish Chinese language scripts for a variety of projects.
  • Actively source and evaluate new IP and identify/onboard writing talent across the region.
  • Serve as the lead writer or "script doctor" on key flagship productions.
  • Work with Producers, Directors, Production, and Post-Production teams to ensure the creative integrity of the script is realised on screen. Partner with the marketing team to ensure stories have strong marketability.
  • Manage efficient end-to-end development processes from concept ideation and treatment to the final shooting script, including managing feedback loops with key stakeholders.
  • Foster a collaborative, results-driven creative culture.
  • Maintain a deep understanding of trends in the Chinese-language entertainment landscape (Greater China & Southeast Asia), audience preferences, and platform requirements for short-form digital content, series, and film.

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proven professional screenwriting and script development experience of at least 5 years, with a portfolio demonstrating excellence across multiple genres such as drama, comedy, romance, thriller, and fantasy
  • Proficiency in writing for all formats, including short-form digital/social content, web series, TV series, and feature films
  • Exceptional command of written and spoken Mandarin Chinese to craft authentic and nuanced dialogue and narratives for Chinese-speaking audiences
  • Proficiency in English for internal communication and business operations
  • Demonstrated leadership in creative project management and mentoring writers

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience in a development executive, story lead, or Head of Department role
  • Deep cultural knowledge of the Chinese-speaking diaspora, especially younger, digitally-native audiences
  • Established industry network of writers, creators, and intellectual property holders in Singapore and the region

postedCompany.description:
mm2 Entertainment is Singapore’s leading media entertainment and content company with regional offices in Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Beijing and the United States. mm2 Entertainment produces content for a multitude of platforms: movies, TV and web series, telemovies, commercial short films and formats; and provides services that cover the entire film-making process, including securing financing, production and distribution, as well as securing advertising and sponsorship.


To date, mm2 Entertainment has produced more than 100 films and distributed close to 200 films across Asia. Notable works include the Ah Boys To Men film franchise, More Than Blue, as well as award-winning films like Guang and A Land Imagined.


mm2 Entertainment is a wholly-owned subsidiary of mm2 Asia Ltd. (SGX stock code: 1B0) - the first Singaporean film production company to be listed on the SGX Mainboard.
postedCompany.name: MM2 ENTERTAINMENT PTE. LTD.
